section.credentials_desc: Work-eligibility documents on this staff profile: residence permit, EU national ID and VCA certificates, each with its own visibility.
section.empty_credentials_desc: Add a residence permit, EU national ID or VCA certificate for this staff member.
section.properties_desc: Free-form name/value details on this profile, optionally with a PDF document and per-customer visibility.
section.empty_properties_desc: Add a property such as a diploma, certificate or internal note field.
visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.ladder_hint: Three steps: admins only → provider-internal → shareable with customers (released per customer below).
eu_locked_notice: EU national ID is visible to provider admins only — enforced by the system. It can never be shared with customers, and the document photocopy can never be made customer-visible.
field.type_immutable_hint: the type cannot be changed after creation
field.name: Name
field.photocopy_toggle: Also show the ID photocopy to customers
field.photocopy_hint: Customers with a grant always see the document number and expiry date; this additionally shares the scanned document.
field.document_replace_hint: Choosing a new file replaces the current document. PDF only, max 10 MB.
grants.title: Shared with customers
grants.desc: Customers in this list can see this item; everyone else cannot.
grants.empty: Not shared with any customer yet.
grants.remove_confirm_body: The customer immediately loses access to this item. You can share it again later.
grants.hint_not_customer_visible: Per-customer sharing becomes available once the visibility is set (and saved) as “Shareable with customers”.
grants.hint_staff_only: Per-customer sharing is only available on properties of field staff.
grants.inert_note: At the selected visibility this item is no longer shareable with customers. Existing customer grants are kept but stop applying until you raise the visibility again.
detail.read_only_hint: Read-only — use Edit (top right) to make changes.
delete_confirm_body: The credential, its document and all customer grants are permanently removed.
delete_property_confirm_body: The property, its document and all customer grants are permanently removed.
validation.too_large: The file is larger than 10 MB.
